name: ESIOS Data Dashboard
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y direnv && echo 'eval "$(direnv hook bash)"' >> ~/.bashrc && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv sync && if [ -n "$DATONS_API_KEY" ] && [ ! -f .env ]; then echo "DATONS_API_KEY=$DATONS_API_KEY" > .env; fi && direnv allow
